label: Draw data
description: Rendering transform data for a pawn render node, containing per-direction rotational data plus scale and anchor settings.

defaultData.label: Default data
defaultData.description: Fallback rotational data used for any direction not covered by a directional override.

dataNorth.label: Data (north)
dataNorth.description: Rotational data for the north-facing direction. Implies rotation = North.

dataEast.label: Data (east)
dataEast.description: Rotational data for the east-facing direction. Implies rotation = East.

dataSouth.label: Data (south)
dataSouth.description: Rotational data for the south-facing direction. Implies rotation = South.

dataWest.label: Data (west)
dataWest.description: Rotational data for the west-facing direction. Implies rotation = West.

scaleOffsetByBodySize.label: Scale offset by body size
scaleOffsetByBodySize.description: If true, the offset is scaled proportionally to the pawn's body size.

useBodyPartAnchor.label: Use body part anchor
useBodyPartAnchor.description: If true, positioning is anchored to the body part rather than the pawn origin.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Uniform scale multiplier applied to this node's draw size.

childScale.label: Child scale
childScale.description: Uniform scale multiplier propagated to child nodes of this node.

bodyTypeScales.label: Body type scales
bodyTypeScales.description: Per-BodyTypeDef scale overrides. Child element names are BodyTypeDef defNames; text is the scale float.
